trigger_condition: Site in Emergency/Critical tier AND decision confidence tier Low
recommended_actions: Dispatch senior officer; collect ground truth; defer automated reallocation

trigger_condition: One or more critical drift alerts in Layer 6 drift report
recommended_actions: Freeze automated duration priors; schedule Layer 4.5 retrain review

trigger_condition: Same event overridden more than once in the audit log
recommended_actions: Escalate to supervisor; review whether the recommendation model is mis-serving the site

trigger_condition: One or more city-wide resource budgets fully deployed
recommended_actions: Trigger mutual-aid request; reprioritize via DIS/ORS; consider diversion-first plans

trigger_condition: Active site classified Emergency operational tier
recommended_actions: Activate incident command; pre-position tow + QRU; open diversion corridors
